title: 用户状态与偏好输入
behavior: 用户可以输入 MBTI、偏好工作时段和当前能量状态，并保存为用户偏好。

acceptance.text: 能量状态字段存在默认值
偏好只影响任务表达和排序
不输出严肃心理判断或预测结论

outOfScope: 不生成健康或命运预测

commands.notes: 4 tests passed; covers A01 storage save, A02 default energy level, A03 expression/ordering-only boundary, and A04 forbidden serious psychology/health/fate claims.
lint and vue-tsc passed after adding the user preference model and goal-create preference UI.
mp-weixin build completed; existing os alias and Sass deprecation warnings remain non-blocking.
full static, feature and system verification passed; 3 test files and 11 tests passed.

evidence.manualSmoke: Mixed verification note: goal-create now exposes a low-pressure preference section with work-style selection, energy selection, optional MBTI input, and a secondary save-preference action. Final Weixin DevTools click-through can still be used as a product smoke check if desired.
evidence.notes: F02 implementation is complete. UserProfile now includes default energyLevel normal, optional MBTI, preferred work style, preferred focus minutes and a boundary that limits preferences to task expression and light ordering. Preference data is saved through services/storage.ts and the page avoids psychological diagnosis or prediction wording.
